note: postduty.in purchased, connected to Cloudflare (zone active), attached to the Worker as a custom domain (SSL issued) -- verified live at https://postduty.in (200). Both admin_order_alert and order_shipped WhatsApp templates now approved (confirmed by owner 2026-07-14), alongside order_confirmation. NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL fixed to https://postduty.in, redeployed, and confirmed added to the Cloudflare Workers Builds build-time environment variables (Settings > Build, not the runtime Variables and secrets screen) -- future git push auto-deploys will now bake the correct domain in. Resend has NOT been verified for postduty.in yet (checked DNS directly -- no DKIM/send-subdomain records exist on the zone).
